# COPILOT-NEXTJS-15.md

> **MIGRATED: This guide is for GitHub Copilot and VS Code workflows.**
> **Source:** claude_md_files/CLAUDE-NEXTJS-15.md

This file provides Next.js 15 guidance for Copilot/VS Code migration.

## Overview

- Use App Router and edge functions for fast iteration.
- Use Copilot injections to scaffold route pages and API handlers.

## Validation

Run `uv run lint && uv run type-check` as described in `AGENTS.md`.
